title: Attack On Titan Final Stand: 2
description: The world of Attack On Titan Into Minecraft
body:
# Explore the world of Attack On Titan
Kill titans, protect civilians
But maybe become a titan yourself?
 

This is Attack On Titan Final Stand and it uses the Shingeki No Craft mod to add the world of Attack On Titan to Minecraft.


## What is Attack On Titan?

Well to explain, Attack On Titan is an anime / manga that focuses on huminites survives locking and hiding them selves behind the great walls name Maria, Rosa and Sina. With the main characters joining the military (Scout Regiment) to fight giant man eating monsters called titans. To save humanity from being "Cattle", so that they can be free.

Slay Titans and stay alive.
